title: バクシン！　フードバトル！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I enter the cafeteria, I notice Sakura Bakushin O sitting
before a gigantic mountain of food with a sparkle in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This food will be gone before you know it...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't my observant trainer! Have you come to witness my
historic achievement firsthand?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, you've got FANTASTIC timing! I was just about to start
practicing for the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Come on, have a seat! You can watch me conquer yet another
obstacle on the road to GLORY!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fear not, Trainer! I'll Bakushin blast this challenge into oblivion—and
soar to VICTORY!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The class representative before you will never bring you shame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from her statement, there seems to be some sort of
food-based challenge at Tracen Academy, and she's planning to
enter.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I must beat this challenge! Only then can I become the TRUE model
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My opponents; one eggstra large omelet rice, a serving of fried chicken that would make anyone bawk, and a house salad big enough to feed a whole mansion!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First up, my absolute favorite—MEAT! I'll down these bad birds at
Baw-kushin speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
After that, I'll start on the omelet rice! Always an eggcellent idea to
follow protein with carbs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And at the tip of the iceberg, we have the salad! It's just a boring salad, so I'll save it for last!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And now all that's left is to... EAT! Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hold my tongue as I watch Sakura Bakushin O push aside the
least-filling dish, the salad, in favor of the heavy fried chicken...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Okay, time for a break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mountain of food before her barely has a dent in it. Which...
makes sense, seeing as she started with the fried foods and
carbohydrates.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I eat, there's still so much food... Are these
magical plates that keep adding more food as I eat?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, your magical sabotage will not hinder me! I'm a class
representative, and a class representative never gives up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will overcome this challenge and show all Umamusume that they can
do ANYTHING if they put their minds to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's taking this pretty seriously, so I decide to offer up some advice.
choice_data_list: I know how you can eat faster!
I know how you can eat faster!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Y-you do?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Is there really a way for me to get faster, even when it comes to eating?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Trainer! Tell me so I can dominate this food challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that fried foods and carbohydrates fill the stomach quicker,
so it's best to start with the less-filling vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Adding that eating the same thing for a long time could be boring, I
also suggest sampling a little bit of everything along the way.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho, a wise suggestion as always... Thank you! In that case, I'll
make sure to cram a little bit of everything in each bite!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Fear not, the class representative will never fail you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she eagerly returns to her food. But before long...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin... Baku... shiii—mmph!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: M-my poor jaw... I'm so sorry...
choice_data_list: That's what you get for taking such big bites.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... My cute little mouth wasn't ready for the carnage I subjected
it to...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Just talking hurts... I can't go on...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer... the rest... is up to you... Blech.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Sakura Bakushin O lays down in a food-induced coma, I pick up my
utensils and begin my futile effort to finish what she started.
